metadata.description: 观察者模式: One-to-many dependency, state change notifies all observers. Publish-subscribe pattern. In the context of software design patterns, this refers to the Observer pattern. Here is a brief Python code example for implementing the Observer pattern: ```python from abc import ABC, abstractmethod # Define the Subject interface class Subject(ABC): @abstractmethod def attach(self, observer): pass @abstractmethod def detach(self, observer): pass @abstractmethod def notify(self): pass # ConcreteSubject implementation class ConcreteSubject(Subject): _state = None _observers = [] def attach(self, observer): self._observers.append(observer) def detach(self, observer): self._observers.remove(observer) def notify(self): for observer in self._observers: observer.update(self._state) def change_state(self, state): self._state = state self.notify() # Define the Observer interface class Observer(ABC): @abstractmethod def update(self, state): pass # ConcreteObserver implementation class ConcreteObserverA(Observer): def update(self, state): print(f"Observer A received new state: {state}") class ConcreteObserverB(Observer): def update(self, state): print(f"Observer B received new state: {state}") # Usage example if __name__ == "__main__": subject = ConcreteSubject() observer_a = ConcreteObserverA() observer_b = ConcreteObserverB() subject.attach(observer_a) subject.attach(observer_b) subject.change_state("New State 1") ``` This code demonstrates the Observer pattern where `ConcreteSubject` maintains a list of observers and notifies them when its state changes. Each `Observer` is updated with the new state by calling their `update` method.

data_pointers.title: 观察者模式
data_pointers.content_preview: 观察者模式: One-to-many dependency, state change notifies all observers. Publish-subscribe pattern. In the context of software design patterns, this refers to the Observer pattern. Here is a brief Python code example for implementing the Observer pattern: ```python from abc import ABC, abstractmethod # Define the Subject interface class Subject(ABC): @abstractmethod def attach(self, observer): pass @abstractmethod def detach(self, observer): pass @abstractmethod def notify(self): pass # ConcreteSubject implementation class ConcreteSubject(Subject): _state = None _observers = [] def attach(self, observer): self._observers.append(observer) def detach(self, observer): self._observers.remove(observer) def notify(self): for observer in self._observers: observer.update(self._state) def change_state(self, state): self._state = state self.notify() # Define the Observer interface class Observer(ABC): @abstractmethod def update(self, state): pass # ConcreteObserver implementation class ConcreteObserverA(Observer): def update(self, state): print(f"Observer A received new state: {state}") class ConcreteObserverB(Observer): def update(self, state): print(f"Observer B received new state: {state}") # Usage example if __name__ == "__main__": subject = ConcreteSubject() observer_a = ConcreteObserverA() observer_b = ConcreteObserverB() subject.attach(observer_a) subject.attach(observer_b) subject.change_state("New State 1") ``` This code demonstrates the Observer pattern where `ConcreteSubject` maintains a list of observers and notifies them when its state changes. Each `Observer` is updated with the new state by calling their `update` method.

content.full:
## 定义
观察者模式（Observer Pattern）是一种行为型设计模式，它定义了对象之间的一对多依赖关系，当一个对象（被观察者）的状态发生变化时，所有依赖于它的对象（观察者）都会自动收到通知并更新。这种模式实现了对象间的松耦合，使得被观察者无需知道观察者的具体实现细节。

## 核心要点
- 主题与观察者分离：被观察者（Subject）维护一个观察者列表，并提供注册、删除和通知机制，观察者（Observer）则定义更新接口。
- 自动通知与更新：当主题状态改变时，会遍历所有注册的观察者并调用其更新方法，确保状态一致性。
- 松耦合设计：主题和观察者之间通过抽象接口交互，可以独立扩展或修改，不影响对方。
- 支持广播通信：一个主题可以同时通知多个观察者，适用于一对多的消息传播场景。
- 可动态订阅：观察者可以在运行时动态加入或退出观察者列表，灵活性高。

## 应用场景
观察者模式广泛应用于事件驱动系统，如GUI框架中的按钮点击监听、消息队列中的发布-订阅机制、以及数据绑定（如MVVM架构中视图模型与视图的同步）。此外，在实时监控系统（如股票价格更新、传感器数据推送）中也常被使用，确保多个展示组件能同时响应数据变化。

## 相关概念
观察者模式与发布-订阅模式（Publish-Subscribe）本质相似，但发布-订阅通常引入消息代理（Broker）实现更彻底的解耦。它与中介者模式（Mediator）的区别在于：中介者集中控制对象间交互，而观察者模式是直接通知。此外，观察者模式常与单例模式（Singleton）结合，确保全局唯一的被观察者实例。
